title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb Writes Code analyzes DeepSeek V4, highlighting its major reduction in inference compute and cost demands compared to competitors. The video explores how V4 represents a strategic shift in LLM development, with open-source labs leveraging different incentive structures than closed labs to achieve lean, efficient models.
